name: Exhibit of Sorrows
author: Poki
description: Exhibit of Sorrows is a horror game set in a bizarre, circus-themed exhibit where nothing is quite as it seems. Explore the eerie museum, solve puzzles, and collect keys—but whatever you do, don’t upset the clown. As you progress, the once-playful dolls take on disturbing new forms, and escaping becomes more desperate. Be prepared to make unsettling choices to survive. Dare to step inside? How to play Exhibit of Sorrows? Click or tap to interact with the exhibits. Who created Exhibit of Sorrows? Exhibit of Sorrows is created by mtsai. This is their first game on Poki! How can I play Exhibit of Sorrows for free? You can play Exhibit of Sorrows for free on Poki. Can I play Exhibit of Sorrows on mobile devices and desktop? Exhibit of Sorrows can be played on your computer and mobile devices like phones and tablets.
